TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-pear_minzhu

S.FORM: ira kuya ccay a rumi’ad masuni tu ku ngiha nu ‘ayam i ira ku malingaday tayra tu i umah malingad.
S.TRANSL: 雞啼。有一天，有一個農夫到田裡工作。
The rooster crowed. One day, there was a farmer who went to the farmland to work.

S.FORM: nika u tayal nira i u mipitpitay tu heci nu kilang.
S.TRANSL: 他的工作是摘水果的。
His work was pick fruits.

S.FORM: ‘adihay ku heci nu kilang nira.
S.TRANSL: 他的果實纍纍。
His fruits were plenty.

S.FORM: mipatala cira tu tulu a fakar sapipatala nira tu heci nu kilang saka tayra cira i umah nira a mipitpit.
S.TRANSL: 他準備三個簍筐，準備用來要裝果實的，所以他去田裡摘。
He prepared three baskets for holding the fruits, so he went to the farmland to pick (fruits).

S.FORM: pitpit sa cira tu kilang a mikalic tu kawal tayra i kilang i.
S.TRANSL: 他爬樓梯去摘果樹。
He climbed up the ladder to pick fruits.

S.FORM: teli nira itini i ka’ayaw nu patalaan nira tu pitelian tu heci nu kilang.
S.TRANSL: 他放置在他前面準備裝水果的(袋子)。
He put (the fruits) in (the bag) that he had prepared to hold the fruits.

S.FORM: u ruray nira mipitpit maharateng aku ku u ruray nu malingaday nu mita matiya u malingaday itini i niyaro’ nu mita.
S.TRANSL: 他摘水果的辛苦，使我想起我們農夫的辛苦，很像在我們部落的農夫一樣。
His toil of picking fruits is reminiscent of our toil as farmers, like the farmers in our village.

S.FORM: huni maherek tu cingra mipitpit i patayraen tu nira i fakar nira.
S.TRANSL: 沒多久，他摘完之後，裝到他的簍筐去。
Before long, (after) he finished picking the fruits, he put them in his basket.

S.FORM: paruhan nira i nengnenghan ca’ay katumes ku tulu a fakar tusa ku matumel matumesay.
S.TRANSL: 他裝起來，看起來三個簍筐都沒有滿，只有裝滿兩個。
He put them (in the baskets), but the three baskets didn’t seem to be full. (Only) two were full.

S.FORM: saka miliyaw ho cingra mikalic i tayra i kilang nira mipitpit tu heci nu kilang.
S.TRANSL: 所以重新爬到樹上去，繼續摘果實。
So he climbed up the tree again to pick fruits.

S.FORM: ya mipitpit cingra tura heci nu kilang i.
S.TRANSL: 他正在摘果實。
He was picking fruits.

S.FORM: ira ku ccay mikitingay tu siri a fa’inayan mita’elif itini i la’enu nu pipitpitan nira tu kilang.
S.TRANSL: 有個男人牽一隻羊，經過他摘果實的樹下。
There was a man pulling a goat along; (he) passed the tree where he picked fruits.

S.FORM: mipitpit cingra tu kilang i sanengnengnengneng sa’an kiya siri tura heci nu kilang sakakuma’enan.
S.TRANSL: 當他摘果實的時候，羊東張西望，想吃水果。
When he was picking fruits, the goat looked around and wanted to eat the fruits.

S.FORM: nika tengteng tengtenghan nira tayra i mita’elif tu mita’elif tura pipitpitan tura kilang tuya heci itira.
S.TRANSL: 羊經過了摘果實的樹。
The goat passed the tree where (he) picked fruits.

S.FORM: ta afa miha halafin tu i ira ku ccay a ka’emangay wawa mikulisiw mita’elif tura pipitpitan nira tura kilang a heci i.
S.TRANSL: 又有一位年輕的小孩騎腳踏車，經過他摘果實的樹。
There was a child riding a bike; (the child) passed the tree where he picked fruits.

S.FORM: maaraw nuya wawa kuya heci i sapialaan.
S.TRANSL: 小孩看見那個水果，想拿。
The child saw the fruits and wanted to take them.

S.FORM: ta telihan nira ku kulisiw nira i tatihi.
S.TRANSL: 他把腳踏車停放在他旁邊。
He put his bike by the side.

S.FORM: nengnenghan nira kuya malingaday i ca’ay pinengneng cingranan.
S.TRANSL: 他望著那個農夫，(但農夫)沒有看他。
He looked at the farmer, (but the farmer) didn’t see him.

S.FORM: sapitakawan tu ccay nika sanengnengnengnenghan nira i.
S.TRANSL: (他)想偷一(簍)，東張西望。
(He) wanted to steal one (basket) and looked around.

S.FORM: ca’ay pinengneng kiya malinagday.
S.TRANSL: 那個農夫沒有看他。
The farmer didn’t see him.

S.FORM: saka harateng sa cingra i kakoyhan aku ku ccay fakar latek ca’ay pakaaraw saka.
S.TRANSL: 所以他想，「我抬一筐的水果，說不定他不會看到。」
So he thought, 'If I take one basket, maybe he won’t see it.'

S.FORM: alahan nira ku ccay fakar pakafithan nira itini i kulisiw nira ta saharakat sa tu mita’elif milaliw.
S.TRANSL: 他拿了一簍筐，掛在他的腳踏車上，很快(從樹下)經過，跑掉。
He took one basket and hung it on his bike, leaving quickly.

S.FORM: salipahak sa cingra a mulaliw i.
S.TRANSL: 他暗中自喜地離開。
He left delightedly.

S.FORM: ‘ayaw maaraw nira ku ccay a ka’emangay a wawa u fafahian makapah sa’an cingra a minengneng i.
S.TRANSL: 前面看見一個年輕的小女孩，他看了非常漂亮。
He saw a young girl ahead. He saw (her and thought she was) beautiful.

S.FORM: sanengnengnengnenghan nira saikor saikor sa u fongoh nira minengneng i puling sa kulisiw nira itini i fatad nu lalan.
S.TRANSL: 看來看去，回頭望一望，在路途中騎腳踏車跌倒。
He looked around and turned round to see, falling from his bike halfway.

S.FORM: mapuling cingra i mataktak ma’emin kiya heci nu kilang.
S.TRANSL: 跌倒之後，果實全部傾倒出來了。
After he fell down, all the fruits fell off.

S.FORM: s nengnenghan nira ku wa’ay nira i malemes sakira.
S.TRANSL: 他看他的腳，流血。
He looked at his foot, which was bleeding.

S.FORM: ca’ahan nira ku fongoh nira i ira ku tatuluay a ka’emangay wawa padanghan nira tura mipudpud tiya kilang.
S.TRANSL: 他抬頭望，有三個年輕的小孩幫他撿拾水果。
He looked up. There were three children helping him pick up the fruits.

S.FORM: salihaday sa kiya falucuh niya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩(偷東西的那個)感到很輕鬆。
The child (who stole the fruits) felt lighthearted.

S.FORM: sanengnenghan nira kuya tatuluay aciyah kuna tatuluay wawa mipadang takuwanan sa’an cingra i.
S.TRANSL: 啊，那三個小孩幫助我，他這麼想。
‘Ah, the three children helped me,’ he thought.

S.FORM: maherek cingra i mapadang nira kiya tatuluay wawa kiya fakar tara i kafekang atu ya heci nu kilang.
S.TRANSL: 完了以後，他幫忙三個小孩把籃子裝在(腳踏車)上面。
After he was done, he helped the three children put the basket on (the bike).

S.FORM: ta ma miliyas tu cingra.
S.TRANSL: 然後他離開了。
The he left.

S.FORM: mita’elif kuya tatuluay wawa i maaraw nira kiya.
S.TRANSL: 他看見那三個小孩經過。
He saw the three children go by.

S.FORM: kafong matefad ila’enok i pudpuden nuya ccay ka’emangay wawa.
S.TRANSL: 帽子掉到地上，一個小孩把它撿起來。
The hat fell onto the ground, and one of the children picked it up.

S.FORM: iyofhan nira ku ngoyos miiyof tuya wawa i saikor a minengneng patikoen kiya kafong ka’emangay wawa kuya mikulisiway.
S.TRANSL: 他吹，回頭看，把帽子還給騎腳踏車的。
He blew and turned around to see, returning the hat to the rider.

S.FORM: harateng sa mitakaway tu heci nu kilang a wawa i aya kafangcal kuna wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那個偷水果的小孩想：「唉呀，這三個小孩那麼好。」
The child who stole the fruits thought, ‘Ah, the children were so kind.’

S.FORM: pafelihan nira tu heci nu kilang kuya tatuluay alaccay cangra tuya heci nu kilang.
S.TRANSL: 他給三個小孩水果，每個人各一個水果
He gave some fruits to the three children, and each had one fruit.

S.FORM: ta miliyas tu kuya wawa.
S.TRANSL: 之後小孩就離開了。
Then, the children left.

S.FORM: huni i ya matu’asay mi malingaday i harateng sa matumes tu ku kuna piala aku mangangay tu maepud tu kaku sa’an cingra i.
S.TRANSL: 後來，那個老人，那個農夫認為，「那個(籃子)摘水果的滿了，我可以下來了。」他這樣想。
Then, the old person, the farmer thought, ‘(the baskets) are full.I could come down,’ he thought.

S.FORM: nengnenghan nira kiya fakar nira i tusa tu.
S.TRANSL: 他看他的籃子，只剩兩(籃)。
He looked at his baskets, only two left.

S.FORM: oya matumesay i ccay tu kuya ‘osaw.
S.TRANSL: 那個裝滿的，只剩一個。
Only one was full.

S.FORM: ma tacuwa tu kuna mi mialaan aku a heci nu kilang haw sa’an cingra.
S.TRANSL: 「我摘的水果到哪裡去了呢？」
'Where were the fruits that I picked?'

S.FORM: sanengnengnengneng sa mita’elif kiya tatuluay a widang ya ihoniay tatuluay a wawa mita’elif itira ta la’enu niya kilang i satongihtongih sa tu heci nu kilang.
S.TRANSL: (他)望來望去，(看到)剛才的三個朋友/小孩經過果樹底下，在吃水果。
He looked around, (seeing) the three friends/children went by eating fruits.

S.FORM: nika sanengnenghan nira nuya matu’asay kiya tatuluay wawa i na tatuluay haw saharatengharateng sa cingra.
S.TRANSL: 那老人家看那三個小孩，想來想去，「這三個人嗎？」
The old man was looking at the three children, thinking, ‘Is it these three people (that stole my fruits)?’

S.FORM: ta’elif sa kuya tatuluay a wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩路過。
The three children went by.

S.FORM: awa tu kuna hetini aca ku pakongku aku.
S.TRANSL: 沒有了，我的故事只有這樣。
I’m done with my story.
